name: PAN Card
description: Permanent Account Number (PAN) is a ten-digit alphanumeric identifier, issued by the Income Tax Department.
eligibility: All Indian citizens (including minors) and corporate entities.
application_steps: Visit the NSDL (Protean) or UTIITSL official portal.
Fill out the application form with personal details.
Upload digital copies of identity, address, and DOB proofs (if applying paperless via e-KYC).
Submit the application and save the 15-digit acknowledgement number.
If not using e-KYC, send the physical documents and signed acknowledgement to NSDL/UTIITSL office.

required_documents.name: Proof of Identity
required_documents.purpose: To establish the applicant's name and identity.
required_documents.where_to_get: Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, Passport, Driving Licence

required_documents.name: Proof of Address
required_documents.purpose: For dispatching the physical PAN card.
required_documents.where_to_get: Aadhaar Card, Post Office Passbook, Latest Utility Bills

required_documents.name: Proof of Date of Birth
required_documents.where_to_get: Birth Certificate, Aadhaar Card, SSLC Certificate

common_mistakes: Name mismatch between Aadhaar and application form.
